fields.label: Public domain name
fields.description: DNS must point to this server (e.g. boards.example.com). Used for HTTPS and APP_URL.

fields.label: Atlantisboard backend host
fields.description: Where the app listens (usually 127.0.0.1 on the same host).

fields.label: Atlantisboard backend port
fields.description: Must match PORT in your .env file.

fields.label: Max upload size (MB)
fields.description: Request body limit at the proxy (match card attachment limits).

fields.label: ACME / Let's Encrypt email
fields.description: Optional. Used by Caddy and certbot for certificate expiry notices.

fields.label: SSL certificate path
fields.description: fullchain.pem from Let's Encrypt or your CA.

fields.label: SSL private key path
fields.description: privkey.pem from Let's Encrypt or your CA.

fields.label: Certbot SSL options include
fields.description: Leave default if you use certbot on Debian/Ubuntu.

fields.label: DH parameters path
fields.description: ssl-dhparams.pem from certbot (optional on modern TLS).

fields.label: Access log file
fields.description: Directory must exist and be writable by caddy user.
